tagline: Providing the Pittsburgh area with safe, clean, and fun pools.

hero.headline: Pittsburgh Pools Deserve Certified Care
hero.subheadline: For over a decade, Allegheny Pool Services has kept communities, clubs, and HOAs swimming safely. Our trained professionals deliver reliable maintenance so you never worry about water quality again.
checkmarks: Certified pool professionals on every job

services.headline: Complete Pool Solutions
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations — everything your pool needs under one trusted roof.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly water chemistry management, cleaning, and inspections that keep your pool safe, sanitary, and swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing — we diagnose and fix mechanical issues fast to minimize downtime.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Restore aging pools to like-new condition with structural repairs, resurfacing, and modern aesthetic upgrades.

cards.title: Pool Painting & Refinishing
cards.description: Professional surface coatings that protect your pool shell and bring back that crisp, clean appearance.

cards.title: Safety Covers
cards.description: Custom-fitted safety covers that protect your pool off-season and prevent unauthorized access for peace of mind.

cards.title: Automated Systems
cards.description: Robotic cleaners and smart controllers installed so your pool practically maintains itself between service visits.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll visit your pool, evaluate its condition, and recommend the right service plan.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our certified technicians perform all maintenance, repairs, or renovations on a schedule that works for you.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is clean, compliant, and ready for swimmers whenever you need it.

about.label: About Allegheny Pool Services
about.headline: A Decade of Commitment to Pittsburgh's Pools
about.description: Founded in 2014, Allegheny Pool Services Co was built on a simple belief: every community deserves access to a safe, well-maintained pool. We specialize in commercial and multifamily aquatic facilities — from condo complexes to private clubs — bringing trained, certified expertise and genuine personal care to every relationship.

features.title: Industry Membership
features.description: Member of the Apartment Association of Metropolitan Pittsburgh

features.title: Commercial Specialists
features.description: Specialized in HOA, condo, and public facility pools

features.title: Certified Professionals
features.description: Trained and certified technicians on every team

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We provide custom quotes based on your pool's size, condition, and service needs — no hidden fees, no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to You
guarantee.description: If you're not satisfied with our service, we'll return and make it right at no additional charge. We stand behind every visit because your trust is what built our business over the past 12 years.

faqs.question: Do you service residential pools or just commercial?
faqs.answer: We serve both. While we specialize in commercial, HOA, and multifamily pools, we also provide full maintenance and renovation services for residential pool owners throughout Allegheny County.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: Commercial pools typically need 3-5 visits per week depending on bather load. Residential pools generally benefit from weekly service. We'll recommend a schedule based on your pool's specific needs.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our pool professionals are trained and certified. We maintain current certifications and continuously update our technical knowledge to provide the highest standard of care.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Allegheny County and surrounding counties throughout the greater Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania area. Contact us to confirm service availability at your location.

faqs.question: Can you help with pool opening and closing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle seasonal openings and winterizations, including safety cover installation, equipment prep, and chemical balancing to protect your investment year-round.

testimonials.name: HomePros Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Allegheny Pool Services is a professionally run company with excellent service and extremely kind employees. Tim will take care of you and all your pool needs!

testimonials.name: Local Customer
testimonials.text: The guys there are very knowledgeable. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Residential Client
testimonials.text: Hired them for a friend's old pool that was decommissioned. They added their custom touch and now the pool is usable and looks fantastic.

contact.headline: Get Your Pool Taken Care Of
contact.subtitle: Request a free assessment and see why Pittsburgh trusts Allegheny Pool Services.
